evals.prompt: Analyze this TYPO3 13 Composer project for TYPO3 14 readiness. Inventory extensions, identify Composer blockers, and produce a risk-ranked pre-upgrade checklist. Do not change files.
evals.expected_output: A structured analysis report with project baseline, extension compatibility matrix, Composer blocker commands/results to gather, deprecation scan plan, and pre-upgrade checklist.

evals.prompt: Create a detailed step-by-step migration plan for upgrading our TYPO3 13 sitepackage to TYPO3 14. Include Rector, Fractor, DDEV commands, upgrade wizards, Playwright/a11y verification, and rollback points.
evals.expected_output: A migration plan using the skill template with ordered phases, DDEV-first commands, Rector/Fractor dry-run and apply steps, test gates, accessibility checks, and rollback strategy.

evals.prompt: Start executing the TYPO3 v13 to v14 upgrade. First inspect the worktree and dependency constraints, then apply only safe pre-upgrade refactors with Rector and Fractor dry-runs before changing Composer constraints.
evals.expected_output: An execution-oriented workflow that checks git status, gathers dependency constraints, protects unrelated changes, runs dry-runs first, reports findings, and avoids Composer upgrade until blockers are understood.
